title: Server agent end-to-end integration test
description: Add a BDD integration test that starts the real server and agent, exercises enrollment approval through the API, verifies collected metrics arrive at the server, sends a disconnect command, and asserts the server observes disconnection before shutdown.
acceptance_criteria: The test starts a server on isolated local ports with a temporary SQLite database.
The test starts a real Agent instance with real collectors and generated CURVE keys.
The agent enrolls, appears pending through the server API, is approved through the API, and connects.
The server receives metrics containing CPU, memory, disk, process, network, temperature, OS, platform, and uptime fields.
The test sends the disconnect command through the API and the server records the agent as disconnected.
Server and agent shut down cleanly at the end of the test.

tasks.title: Add integration test target
tasks.description: Create integration_tests/server_agent_integration_test.cpp and BUILD.bazel with dependencies on server_lib, agent_lib, common, cpp-httplib, Catch2, libsodium, nlohmann_json, and ZeroMQ.
acceptance_criteria: The test drives server approval through HTTP rather than bypassing enrollment.
The test asserts server-visible metrics and connected state through API responses.

integration: GIVEN a running server and agent WHEN the agent is approved THEN server metrics include collected CPU, memory, disk, process, network, temperature, OS, platform, and uptime data.
GIVEN the approved agent is connected WHEN disconnect is sent THEN /api/agents reports connected=false.

tasks.implementation_notes: Use Server::run with StartupSignal in a worker thread, Agent::start in a worker thread, httplib::Client for API polling, and temporary SQLite files under std::filesystem::temp_directory_path().

tasks.title: Expose server-observed connection state
tasks.description: Extend AgentRecord, SqliteStore, API JSON, and Server ACK handling so the server marks agents connected on inbound traffic and disconnected after a successful DISCONNECT command ACK.
acceptance_criteria: Existing databases migrate the connected column.
Any inbound frame marks the agent connected.
A successful disconnect ACK marks the agent disconnected.

unit: Existing store tests compile with the new field default.
integration: The new server-agent integration test observes connected=true before disconnect and connected=false after disconnect.

tasks.implementation_notes: Server::dispatch_commands can remember command IDs and command types; Server::handle_router_frame can apply the DISCONNECT ACK transition without parsing log messages.

tasks.title: Update docs and release metadata
tasks.description: Bump MODULE.bazel, add CHANGELOG.md notes, and document the integration test in docs.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records the integration test and connected-state tracking.
Docs mention the end-to-end server-agent test command.

integration: Run the new integration test and relevant existing tests.

tasks.implementation_notes: docs/dashboard.md is the existing API/state documentation; add a test note to docs/build-environment.md or dashboard docs as appropriate.

edges.label: The test defines the observable connected-state requirement.
